example_queries: SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%TDF%' AND haeji_gb='1' LIMIT 10
SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm, bm_nm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%한국투자%' LIMIT 5
SELECT gijun_ymd, fund_cd, seolj_aek, nav FROM FDTFN201 ORDER BY gijun_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) as latest_date FROM FDTFN201
SELECT * FROM BB_TDF0JG ORDER BY tr_ymd DESC LIMIT 10

common_queries.name: TDF 펀드 목록
common_queries.sql: SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%TDF%' AND haeji_gb='1'

common_queries.name: 펀드 설정액 순위
common_queries.sql: SELECT f.fund_fnm, d.seolj_aek FROM FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd=d.fund_cd WHERE d.gijun_ymd=(SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) FROM FDTFN201) ORDER BY d.seolj_aek DESC LIMIT 10
